conversations.ai_response: ModuleNotFoundError usually means a required package isn't installed. What specific module is missing? I can help you install it.
This is the NVIDIA AI Endpoints package for LangChain. Install it with: pip install langchain-nvidia-ai-endpoints. Make sure you're in your virtual environment first.

conversations.user_input: Should I use a virtual environment?
conversations.ai_response: Yes, definitely! Virtual environments prevent package conflicts. Create one with: python -m venv .venv, then activate it with: source .venv/bin/activate (on macOS/Linux) or .venv\Scripts\activate (on Windows).
You're welcome! Virtual environments and proper package management are essential for Python development. Your setup should now work smoothly.
